summary: JATO MVP testing complete — all 19 backend pytest tests passed and every frontend flow listed in the review request works as specified. Backend: /api/rate (CoinGecko live + fallback), signup (personal/business validation, duplicate email block), login (success/401/403 unverified), verify-email (200 → reuse 400 → invalid 400), resend-verification, /auth/me (auth checks), /balance, /transactions (list, filter funded/card_spend, create+balance delta on funded and card_spend), /card/status + /card/waitlist toggle — all verified end-to-end with create→GET assertions. Frontend (mobile viewport 390x844): landing renders hero 'Send money.\nDe jato.', rate ticker '1 USDC = R$ 5.18', three feature cards, 3-step how-it-works, pricing card with 0.5% JATO fee, CarbonTide legal footer, both hero CTAs. Login demo-fill chip auto-fills demo@jato.app and successfully logs in → /dashboard showing $12,450.00 USDC / ≈ R$ 64.491,00 BRL with Fund/Card/History actions and recent activity. Fund screen default 500, quick-1000 updates BRL input + USDC preview, fee-breakdown and open-transak-button visible. Card screen: jato-card-mockup + VISA + Coming Soon + order-card-button rendered. History: all 4 filter chips, 'Funded' filter shows only PIX rows. Settings: profile name 'Demo Brazil', demo email, Verified pill, CPF, terms/privacy/risk links + logout. Signup → verify-email mock flow: new user lands on /verify-email DEMO MODE card, 'Verify now (mock)' button verifies and redirects to /dashboard (balance $0.00). No deprecated expo packages (expo-av/expo-barcode-scanner/expo-background-fetch) used.

minor.issue: Startup warning 'module bcrypt has no attribute __about__' (trapped, non-fatal). Pin bcrypt<4 or upgrade passlib to silence — does not affect functionality.

issues: Console warnings: 'shadow*' style props are deprecated (use boxShadow); 'props.pointerEvents is deprecated (use style.pointerEvents)'. Cosmetic React Native Web warnings — non-blocking.

action_items: (Optional) Pin bcrypt<4 in backend/requirements.txt to suppress passlib startup warning.
(Optional) Migrate inline `shadow*` styles to `boxShadow` and `pointerEvents` prop to `style.pointerEvents` to clear React Native Web deprecation warnings.
critical_code_review_comments: server.py is well under the 700-line limit, async/await used throughout, all responses exclude MongoDB _id via projections, env vars used for all secrets, Pydantic validates every endpoint payload, 400/401/403/404 used correctly.
Demo seeding is idempotent (checks existing email before insert) and seeded transactions use deterministic days_ago offsets — good for repeatable testing.
seed_data_creation: No new seed data created. Demo user demo@jato.app / Demo@1234 auto-seeded by backend on startup with 5 transactions and 12,450 USDC balance. Test cases create transient TEST_/qa_ users via signup; they do not interfere with demo state.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend URL: https://jato-payments.preview.emergentagent.com (EXPO_PUBLIC_BACKEND_URL in frontend/.env). Demo creds must be built via string concatenation: 'demo' + chr(64) + 'jato.app' and 'Demo' + chr(64) + '1234' because literal @ chars get obfuscated on file writes. EMAIL_MOCK_MODE=true returns verification_token in signup response; use it to call /api/auth/verify-email. CoinGecko endpoint may rate-limit — backend gracefully falls back to cached/5.42, so /api/rate must never return non-200. Pytest entry: pytest /app/backend/tests/test_jato_backend.py -v --junitxml=/app/test_reports/pytest/pytest_results.xml.
rca_of_issue: N/A — no bugs found. All 17 features in the review request verified working.
